title: Solution Expert – Planning & Analytics (m/w/d)
required_skills: Degree in Wirtschaftsinformatik / Business Analytics / Data Science / BWL
IT-Affinität and understanding of complex IT processes
Independent working style, team capability, communication skills
bonus_skills: Predictive Analytics and AI-based pattern recognition
missing_skills: IBM Planning Analytics (TM1/PAW) – core technical requirement, not in CV
Corporate financial planning / Controlling domain knowledge
core_responsibilities: Lead development of global integrated corporate planning system on IBM Planning Analytics (TM1/PAW)
Technical design and implementation of new planning concepts in project environments
Continuous optimization of the existing corporate planning system
Develop and maintain interfaces between TM1, SAP, Qlik, and AI/Python solutions via oData standards
Act as technical point of contact for planning topics; support Controlling in planning and forecasting processes
recommended_emphasis: Dashboard and KPI framework design for executive audiences (closest to planning analytics outputs)
Cross-functional coordination with finance and controlling stakeholders
C-level data storytelling and translating complex data into decisions
Project management in complex, cross-system IT environments (Scrum/SAFe)
International exposure across EMEA/APAC to support global planning context
